content.name: Biology & Chemistry Practice
content.description: Original single-correct MCQ practice set for biology and chemistry revision.

questions.question: Which organelle is primarily responsible for ATP production in eukaryotic cells?
questions.explanation: Mitochondria are the main site of aerobic respiration and ATP synthesis.

questions.question: In humans, the oxygen-carrying pigment present in red blood cells is:
questions.explanation: Hemoglobin binds oxygen in red blood cells and transports it through the body.

questions.question: Which functional group is present in carboxylic acids?
questions.explanation: Carboxylic acids contain the carboxyl group, written as -COOH.

questions.question: The pH of a neutral solution at 25°C is closest to:
questions.explanation: At 25°C, a neutral aqueous solution has pH 7.

questions.question: Which of the following is a biodegradable polymer?
questions.explanation: PHBV is a biodegradable polymer often discussed in biomaterials contexts.

questions.question: If one strand of DNA has the base sequence ATGC, the complementary strand is:
questions.explanation: A pairs with T, and G pairs with C, so ATGC pairs with TACG.
